question: What must the signaller do when alerted to a train accident?
gold_answer:
If you are alerted to a train accident, you must:
• immediately protect each obstructed line or arrange for this to be done
• take any other action needed to prevent trains approaching the accident as shown in the appropriate Train Signalling Regulations
• make an emergency broadcast to trains in

top1_per_strategy.BM25: RSSB_M1_2023 | SECTION 2 — What to do after a train accident

question: What must the guard do regarding passenger safety during an accidental train division?
gold_answer:
You must:
• find out whether anybody might have fallen from the train
• secure gangway end doors, if you can do this
• make sure passengers are in a safe position on the train.

top1_per_strategy.Hybrid_RRF_Reranked: RSSB_M1_2023 | 5.1 Passenger train - safety of passengers

question: Under what conditions are emergency responders allowed to access railway infrastructure without waiting for a Rail Incident Officer?
gold_answer:
Considered where a RIO is unavailable or there is insufficient time for a RIO to attend.
NR Route Control will manage safety mitigation relating to train movements, traction power off (where required) and access.
The NR Route Control will provide a reference number when access is authorised.

question: What are the effects on the human body of contact with electrified OLE or third rail?
gold_answer:
the heat passing through the human body causes severe damage to internal organs.
tissue burns beneath the skin cause scarring and black marks on the surface.
the muscles in the heart fail – stopping the flow of blood and oxygen.
lungs and respiratory system are paralysed.

question: When must cold weather inspections be performed on SCRRA track?
gold_answer: Cold weather inspections must be performed when ambient temperature is forecasted to be 32°F or lower.

question: What percentage of personnel planning details should be organized by the DD stage?
gold_answer: At this point, it is desirable that 80-90% of the necessary details (including the number of personnel based on equipment quantity and specifications) have been organized.

question: How far in advance of handover should the operating entity be established?
gold_answer: Operating entity establishment: 2-3 years before handover
